documentation_commit_message: docs: update tactical battle screen layout guide
comparison_base_assumption: Used commit efc5eac6e32f363de7f5a5c0f457854de1570711, the direct parent of implementation commit 4d8cb29beb1bd94fc84cd394bb9686adcb845007, as the safest story-specific base because it is the last commit before this FBattleScreen layout change begins on the stacked branch.
documentation_decision: Updated `doc/UsersGuide.md` because the shipped tactical battle screen behavior is user-visible and the existing guide was outdated: it still claimed a constant-height lower panel and an 800x600 default size. No tactical rules documentation or repository-wide contributor guidance update was required for this layout-only change.
